description: This file controls what Item Types will appear as possible items to purchase in the Gambling UI. Item Types can be added to this list as a potential option for the Gambling system. Any column field name starting with "*" is considered a comment field and is not used by the game.
source: Colonnes du .txt (BKVince 3.2) ; types/descriptions du guide TXT eezstreet-d2rdoc.

columns.name: name
columns.description: This is a reference field to describe the Item

columns.name: code
columns.description: This is a pointer to armor.code, weapons.code, or misc.code
